'''鈭歯-v-t-j''' ('''kanavtejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweak|tweak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweak|tweak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-v-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| kanavtejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavtejoko|thinavtejoko]] || [[word:jinavtejoko|jinavtejoko]] || [[word:shinavtejoko|shinavtejoko]] || [[word:kinavtejoko|kinavtejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
